steps.title: Use the opposite-effect clue
steps.content: The sentence says Jug found that tilling increased winter wheat yield, but that other crops showed the opposite effect. The completion therefore needs a different crop for which not tilling produced a better yield than tilling.

steps.title: Check the remaining evidence
steps.content: Choice B describes a similar association, so it does not show the opposite effect. Choice C gives a range of yields with tilling but no no-tilling comparison. Choice D uses winter wheat and again shows tilling producing more. The rice example is the only one showing no tilling outperforming tilling for another crop. The answer is A.
